title: Claude Fable 5 (TESTED): UHM... It's actually not worth it..
summary: AICodeKing tested Claude Fable 5 and concludes it performs well on benchmarks but is not a major practical improvement over existing models like Opus or GPT-4.5. The reviewer raises concerns about pricing, safeguard restrictions on risky tasks, and limited daily-use value despite strong benchmark results.
